texto: Zen is a double-edged sword, killing words and thoughts, yet at the same time, giving them life. Although beyond human intellect and philosophy, Zen is their root and source.
explicacao: Citação de Masao Abe sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Zen is a double-edged sword, killing words and thoughts, yet at the same time, giving them life. …” articula reflexao, zen, double em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
